query:
SELECT 
  '慕伊娜排班' as type,
  w.id as workerId,
  w.name as workerName,
  a.weekStartDate,
  DATE_FORMAT(a.weekStartDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as weekStartFormatted,
  a.confirmedAt,
  SUBSTRING(a.timeBlocks, 1, 200) as timeBlocksPreview
FROM workers w
LEFT JOIN availability a ON w.id = a.workerId
WHERE w.name LIKE '%伊娜%'
ORDER BY a.weekStartDate DESC
LIMIT 3

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  '米窩需求單' as type,
  d.id as demandId,
  c.name as clientName,
  d.demandDate,
  DATE_FORMAT(d.demandDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as demandDateFormatted,
  d.startTime,
  d.endTime
FROM demands d
JOIN clients c ON d.clientId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%米窩%'
ORDER BY d.demandDate DESC
LIMIT 3;
